invocations.detail: Sandbox initialization could not read substantive local repository files; no remote or stale substitute verdict was accepted.

invocations.sandbox: danger-full-access with an explicit strictly read-only review prompt
invocations.detail: Filesystem access was widened only after the read-only sandbox failure; the reviewer reported that the exact reviewed worktree remained clean.

findings: P1: committed milestone uploads were not accumulated against the visible quota snapshot
P1: synchronous scalar logging could stall training indefinitely
P1: partial watch installation could leave hooks attached after an exception
P2: canonical W&B documentation described a superseded DGX protocol
P2: experiment wording overstated physical checkpoint digest equality
P2: prepared PR provenance mixed requested and actual model values
